name: Rogz Dog Utility Fixed Leash Large - Blue
shortDescription: Keep your dog safe and visible at night with the Rogz Utility Fixed Reflective Lead, featuring reflective stitching and the secure RogLoc buckle for confident, controlled walks. Rogz Utility Fixed Lead/Leash – Large Blue
description: Rogz Utility Fixed Reflective Dog Lead/Leash has a reflective yarn woven into the webbing for night time visibility so that everyone is aware that you & your dog are on an outing. Key Features: Reflective Stitching: Reflective yarn is woven into the webbing for night time visibility. RogLoc: RogLoc is the Fort Knox of release buckle Low Load Technology: LLT technology reduces the load on the Titanium Plastic buckle through a cleverly positioned load ring Contoured Plastic Component: ROGZ rounded contoured plastic components ensure that every ROGZ collar fits snugly Die-cast ring: Custom designed die cast ring (no welding). Electroplated chrome for a tarnish free finish Size: Length 1.4m, Width 2.0cm
